g.text: Ultra-Fast Associative Memory System for AI Enhancement
Think of it as giving AI a "photographic memory" with instant recall

svg.text: How a Memory Flows Through the System
Follow the journey of a memory packet as it travels through each processing layer

g.text: Like your short-term memory - captures and timestamps everything
Like pattern recognition - finds memories that are similar or related
Like neural pathways - creates connections between related concepts
Like intuition - predicts what information you'll need next
"Based on your Python learning in 2020, here are..."
Complete with context, related info, and predictions
MFN transforms simple memories into rich, connected knowledge graphs with sub-millisecond access times
